touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Julian Reddy at ValleyForward. No answer, left voicemail introducing our forecasting automation platform.
Second cold call attempt to Julian Reddy. No answer, no voicemail left this time.
Cold email to Julian introducing our PropTech-focused forecasting solution. Julian responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities for his sales team.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform specifically help with sales forecasting accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Our AI analyzes deal signals in real-time and provides predictive insights that typically improve forecast accuracy by 20-30%.

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message sent to Julian with case study from similar PropTech company. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message mentioning upcoming call. No response received.

Qualification call with Julian Reddy. Discussed current forecasting challenges at ValleyForward. Julian mentioned he's new to the Head of Sales role (3 months) and looking to improve team performance. Currently evaluating Gong as well. Identified need for 29 seats across sales org.

questions_asked.question: What are your biggest pain points with forecasting today?
questions_asked.answer: We're consistently off by 15-20% each quarter. The team lacks visibility into deal health and we're relying on gut feel.

questions_asked.question: What's your implementation timeline and how does onboarding work?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 2-3 weeks for full deployment with dedicated CSM support throughout.

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Julian. Deep dive into ValleyForward's sales process, tech stack, and forecasting methodology. Julian shared that leadership is putting pressure on forecast accuracy. Discussed integration with their existing CRM. Julian mentioned Gong is also in consideration but pricing is a concern.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in this decision?
questions_asked.answer: I'll need to loop in Sebastian Mitchell from the sales team for technical evaluation and Diego from IT for procurement, but I'm driving this.

questions_asked.question: How do you compare to Gong in terms of forecasting capabilities?
questions_asked.answer: We're purpose-built for forecasting with XGBoost models, while Gong is broader conversation intelligence. Our accuracy metrics are typically higher for forecast use cases.

questions_asked.question: What kind of discount can you offer for a mid-market company like us?
questions_asked.answer: We can definitely work with you on pricing once we finalize the scope and package.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with discovery call recap, ROI calculator, and proposed demo agenda. Julian responded confirming availability and asking for pricing ballpark for 29 seats with consulting services.

questions_asked.question: Can you give me a rough estimate for 29 seats with the automations plus consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: For that configuration we're typically in the $28-32K ACV range, but we can discuss specifics on our next call.

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Julian walking through custom demo and pricing. Presented automations_plus_consulting package at $31,500 ACV. Julian engaged positively but mentioned budget constraints and that he needs to get this approved without executive sponsor involvement yet.

questions_asked.question: Would it make sense to include your VP of Sales or CRO in the next conversation?
questions_asked.answer: I'd prefer to get further along first. I have the authority to move this forward and I'll bring in leadership when needed.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the pricing? We're working with a tighter budget than that number.
questions_asked.answer: We can explore some options. What's your target budget?

objections: Pricing is above initial budget expectations

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with revised proposal at $22,400 ACV (28.9% discount) to meet budget constraints. Julian responded positively and confirmed Sebastian Mitchell will join for technical evaluation. Also mentioned Diego from IT will need to review from procurement perspective.
next_steps: Schedule exec meeting with broader team

touches.ai_summary: Exec meeting with Julian and Sebastian Mitchell (Account Manager, technical evaluator). Sebastian asked detailed questions about integrations, data security, and reporting capabilities. Julian facilitated but still no C-level involvement. Sebastian compared features to Gong throughout the call.

questions_asked.question: How does your API integrate with Salesforce and what's the data refresh frequency?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time webhook integration with Salesforce, data syncs every 15 minutes, full API documentation provided.

questions_asked.question: What's your uptime SLA and what happens if forecasting models underperform?
questions_asked.answer: 99.9% uptime SLA with performance guarantees in the contract. We monitor model accuracy continuously.

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful to bring in your CRO to discuss the strategic impact on forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Not at this stage. I'll brief leadership once we finalize terms.

objections: Gong offers broader conversation intelligence features beyond just forecasting
next_steps: Loop in Diego for procurement review

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Julian focused on contract terms. Discussed payment terms, contract length, and service level agreements. Julian pushing for annual payment terms and additional services included at the discounted rate.

questions_asked.question: Can we get quarterly business reviews and dedicated CSM included without increasing the price?
questions_asked.answer: QBRs are included standard. Dedicated CSM is part of the consulting package you're getting.

questions_asked.question: Have you had a chance to discuss this with your executive team? Would be great to align on success metrics.
questions_asked.answer: I'm managing this internally. My team and I are aligned on the use case and ROI.

objections: Wants annual payment terms instead of upfront

touches.ai_summary: Extended negotiation call with Julian and Diego Okafor (IT Director, procurement). Diego raised questions about data privacy, vendor security compliance, and contract risk. Julian advocating internally but Diego thorough in procurement review. Discussed Gong comparison again and pricing justification. Agreement to move forward with annual payment terms and $22,400 ACV pending final legal review.

questions_asked.question: What's your SOC 2 Type II status and GDPR compliance certification?
questions_asked.answer: We're SOC 2 Type II certified as of last quarter and fully GDPR compliant. Can provide audit reports.

questions_asked.question: How does the total cost of ownership compare to Gong over 3 years?
questions_asked.answer: At this pricing with our forecasting specialization, TCO is approximately 35% lower than Gong for your use case.

questions_asked.question: What's your target close date and do we need executive sign-off before legal review?
questions_asked.answer: Targeting end of this month. I can get this through legal and procurement without executive review at this contract size.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide customer references from similar PropTech companies?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we'll connect you with two PropTech customers who implemented for forecasting use cases.

objections: Need to ensure vendor risk assessment is complete before final approval
next_steps: Finalize contract with annual payment terms
